# Australia Visa Points Calculator

> Independent Schedule 6D points estimator for Australian skilled migration subclasses 189, 190, and 491. Includes a visa subclass directory, migration guides, and a practice workspace for registered migration agents. Estimates only — not Department of Home Affairs advice or migration assistance.

## Audience
- Skilled migration applicants (free public calculator)
- Registered migration agents (client files, share links, PDF on paid plan)

## Key pages
- Points calculator: /calculator
- Visa directory (reference): /visas
- Guides: /blog
- For migration agents: /for-agents
- FAQ: /faq
- Official sources: /sources
- Disclaimer: /disclaimer
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml

## Scoring scope
Schedule 6D points only. Subclasses 189, 190, and 491 scored together from one assessment. Other visa subclasses in the directory are not points-tested in this tool.
